name: Potatoes with Bacon & Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, fry the bacon until almost crisp. Drain most of the fat.
2. Chop the bacon and return it to the pan.
3. Add sliced zucchini, butter, and olive oil to the pan. Sauté until slightly soft.
4. In a large serving bowl, slice the potatoes about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Add the bacon-vegetable mixture, salt, and freshly ground pepper to the potatoes. Mix well.
6. Serve hot or warm. You may also use sliced onions in this recipe. Add them with the zucchini.
